examples: The Canadian researchers used a method to study air bubbles trapped in halite, the natural form of table salt.
Experimental work indicates that about 14% of the bromide in sea water precipitates with the halite as sea water evaporates.
Meanwhile, halite is also a good cap rock, and would be in plastic state under high temperature and high pressure condition.
Halite Energy plans to build the underground store on the Wyre Estuary site near Preesall.
Previous applications for the site made by Canatxx UK, which has since reformed as Halite Energy, were rejected.
